new_classes.definition_en: A quality borne by a wine indicating that it originates from the Tokaj (Tokaj/Tokay) protected designation of origin wine region, as defined in additional note 4(B)(b) to Chapter 22 of the CN.

new_classes.label_en: Tokaj wine, in containers holding ≤ 2 l (CN 2204 21 23)
new_classes.label_de: Tokajwein in Behältnissen mit einem Inhalt von 2 l oder weniger (KN 2204 21 23)
new_classes.definition_en: Wine of fresh grapes with the Tokaj protected designation of origin, presented in containers holding 2 litres or less, as specified in CN subheading 2204 21 23 and additional note 4(B)(b) to Chapter 22.

coverage_explanation: The three main discriminating criteria are captured: (1) Tokaj protected designation of origin quality, (2) wine produced from fresh grapes (FreshGrapeOriginQuality reused from TBox), and (3) small container ≤ 2 l (SmallContainer reused from TBox). However, coverage is not 1.0 because additional note 4(B)(b) to Chapter 22 contains detailed legal criteria defining the Tokaj PDO (geographic boundaries, grape varieties, minimum must weight, production rules, etc.) that cannot be fully encoded without first importing or modelling those specific sub-criteria. The note reference is captured only abstractly via the TokajOriginQuality class; the detailed compositional and geographic conditions of the note are not axiomatised. Additionally, the non-sparkling (still / semi-sparkling distinction within 2204 21) is implied by the parent subheading 2204 21 context but not yet explicitly modelled as a complement to SparklingWineQuality, which is a minor gap.
